title: Gumnaam
subTitle: An aspiring director reluctantly becomes a police officer. Soon after, he starts investigating a serial murder case wherein the killer targets teenage girls.

title: Police Officer
subTitle: Jai, a kind-hearted policeman gets killed during one of his encounters. His twin, who is an infamous conman, decides to track down Jai's murderer.

title: Afsana Dilwalon Ka
subTitle: A gifted singer, Banne Khan, falls in love with Saba. However, Titlibai, a woman who wants him to marry her daughter, invites him to stay at her house.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Gabbar Sher
subTitle: After receiving an invitation from his former girlfriend in Bangkok, a forest guide visits her in the hope of reconciliation, but becomes embroiled in a series of bizarre events.

title: Hero Hindustani
subTitle: A young woman conspires with a man to fake a relationship, outsmarting her grandfather's plans to marry her off to a stranger.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
subTitle: When stars misalign, love blossoms between an astrology-obsessed idler and a headstrong fish heiress whose father will settle for nothing less than a hardworking son-in-law.

title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
subTitle: Bhaijaan, the eldest of three siblings, refuses to get married to maintain harmony in his family. However, complications arise after his brothers conspire for him to fall in love.

title: Jawaan
subTitle: Azad fights against the systemic oppression of society. Soon, he finds himself in a web of deceit and crime as he teams up with a group of allies to take down a ruthless arms dealer.

title: Laadla
subTitle: Raju, an upright union leader, can do anything at his wheelchair-bound mother's behest, even if it means breaking his own heart and giving in to a rude heiress.

title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Ravi Kapoor, a police officer and Sonu Dada, a former criminal, join hands together to take down a notorious gangster, Chandi Das.

title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Ravi Kapoor, a police officer and Sonu Dada, a former criminal, join hands together to take down a notorious gangster, Chandi Das.

title: Khudgarz
subTitle: Sita raises her son, Bihari, and his friend Amar as her own and the two treat each other like brothers. However, Amar's father is not too fond of Bihari, and he tries to create a rift between the two.

title: Akbar Birbal
subTitle: Clever Birbal aids Emperor Akbar in witty adventures, solving puzzles and delivering justice across Mughal India, unfolding tales of wisdom and humor.

title: Zee Anmol Cinema
subTitle: A gangster's driver takes the blame for an accident, leaving his family alone. He seeks revenge when he finds out what happened to them while he was gone.

title: Kohram
subTitle: When a teacher is killed by two village tyrants, Thakur and Kalia, his brother Arjun swears to avenge him. Years later, Arjun kills Thakur and then joins forces with his brother's sons to face Kalia.

title: Masoom
subTitle: A gangster, Barood, kills Vikram Singh and kidnaps his only son, Kishan. Meanwhile, an investigative journalist, Akash, tracks down Barood and tries to get him arrested and punished for his crimes.

title: Surya The Soldier
subTitle: When a soldier lands in trouble due to his anger issues, he begins seeing a psychologist in hopes of one day returning to duty.

title: Rathnam
subTitle: Rathnam, a henchman for MLA Panner Selvam, rescues a girl from attackers during her interview trip to Vellore. As he becomes her protector, he wonders how long he can keep her safe.

title: Lal Baadshah
subTitle: Lal Singh, a righteous and helpful man, clashes against Dayal Singh, a powerful personality. However, things get complicated when a hidden treasure is involved and Lal's tragic past is disclosed.

title: Krantiveer
subTitle: Pratap, a gambler disowned by his family, comes under the care of a landlord named Laxminath. When corrupt forces lead to Laxminath's murder, Pratap seeks revenge.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Zafar's obsessive love for Salma leads to her separation from her son, Iqbal. Twenty years later, Iqbal strives to reunite with his mother.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Zafar's obsessive love for Salma leads to her separation from her son, Iqbal. Twenty years later, Iqbal strives to reunite with his mother.

title: Divya Shakti
subTitle: A young reporter, Prashant Verma, tired of injustice, bears witness to a murder case and wages war against Tau. But in the process, his life and family members get threatened.

title: Main Tera Dushman
subTitle: When a Forest Officer, Kishan Srivastav, hinders the criminal activities of Thakur Dayalu, he is framed for murder and sent to jail. Later, Kishan escapes prison and tries to clear his name.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Masti Express
subTitle: An auto-rickshaw driver, Raju, wants his son to have the best education. So he seizes the opportunity to win a large sum of money in a racing contest.

title: Karthikeya 2
subTitle: The movie deals with the personal problems of Karthik and how he comes out of them. His pursuit of the truth leads him to find out the power of Indian ancient system and Tatva of Lord Sri Krishna.

title: Jaal: The Trap
subTitle: Ajay, a commando, is forced to kidnap Anita, the home minister's daughter, to free his girlfriend Neha from the clutches of terrorists. In the process, he uncovers a shocking revelation.

title: Dhamaal
subTitle: Four lazy friends learn about a hidden treasure in Goa and set out to find it. However, a police inspector learns about their plan and begins to pursue them.

title: Valimai
subTitle: Arjun, a police officer, sets out on a mission to hunt down a group of violent bikers after they are involved in a theft and murder. When a city's crime rate rises, it is up to Arjun, a police officer, to restore order.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
subTitle: Pawan Chaturvedi rises above the divisive bounds of nationality and religion to help a little Pakistani girl stranded in India.

title: Ajay
subTitle: Manorama falls in love with Ajay, even though they come from different social backgrounds. They want to get married, but Manorama's uncles try their best to separate the happy couple.
